seo.title: Holiday home Ardennes 26 persons | ArdenNest Gedinne
seo.description: Quiet luxury for moments together. Holiday home with 9 bedrooms, ensuite bathrooms and professional kitchen. Welcoming families since 2003.

differentiatorsSeo.title: Why choose ArdenNest holiday home
differentiatorsSeo.description: Personal guidance, professional kitchen, all-inclusive pricing and quiet luxury in every detail. Discover why guests have been returning for 22 years.

hero.headline: Quiet luxury for moments together
hero.h1: Holiday home for 26 people in Gedinne, Belgian Ardennes
hero.subheadline: 4.8★ from 50+ families · 22 years of hospitality · One table for everyone

tiles.label: people
tiles.description: Perfect for groups of 10 to 26 — multi-generational families and friend groups under one roof

tiles.label: ensuite bathrooms
tiles.description: Every bedroom has its own bathroom — no morning queue

tiles.label: private garden
tiles.description: Rolling landscape with football pitch, pétanque and hidden corners

tiles.label: by 50+ families
tiles.description: Multi-generational groups confirm what works — read the reviews

differentiators.h1: Everything that serves togetherness. Nothing that distracts from it.

customerJourney.title: Personal Guidance
customerJourney.description: You organise — we think along. From your first question to the moment you pull the door shut behind you, you have one point of contact: Bieke. No call centre, no chatbot, no form disappearing into a queue. One person who knows the house, knows the area, and helps you make it a carefree weekend.
customerJourney.feature1: One dedicated contact — from booking to departure, always the same person on the line.
customerJourney.feature2: Clear payment terms — no hidden costs, no surprises afterwards.
customerJourney.feature3: Forgotten something? Left-behind items are sent back — no hassle.
customerJourney.feature4: Tailored tips — we've lived here for 25 years and know every walk, every restaurant and every activity in the area.

kitchenPro.title: Restaurant-Grade Kitchen
kitchenPro.description: Not your typical holiday kitchen. This is restaurant-grade equipment — built to run daily for 26 people. Everything is professional quality, right down to the fire suppression system above the stove.
kitchenPro.feature1: Lacanche Cluny — restaurant-worthy stove with gastronorm oven and warming drawer
kitchenPro.feature2: 2 Miele Professional dishwashers — everything clean in 30 minutes
kitchenPro.feature3: Professional fridge and cool pantry — room for all the group's groceries
kitchenPro.feature4: Fire suppression system above the stove — safety to professional standards

gardenFull.title: The Garden
gardenFull.description: Nothing is straight, nothing is rigid — a vast rolling landscape where children disappear for hours and adults unwind. More than enough space to run, play and discover, without getting in each other's way. No swimming pool to watch over, just endless space. Always well-maintained.
gardenFull.feature1: Football field, volleyball net and pétanque lane — plenty of choice for all ages, without bringing anything.
gardenFull.feature2: Hidden spots throughout the garden — children always discover something new. Building dens, hide and seek, treasure hunts.
gardenFull.feature3: 3 large benches and 10 professional sun loungers with side tables — adults relax while the children play. Everyone in sight.
gardenFull.feature4: Terrace between house and garden with 2 barbecues — the perfect transition between inside and outside. Aperitifs with the group while the children keep playing.

gameRoom.title: The Games Room
gameRoom.description: The place where teenagers put down their phones and adults become twelve again. A separate building with space to play without disturbing the rest of the house — or being disturbed. Ideal for a rainy afternoon or a tournament after dinner.
gameRoom.feature1: Professional pool table — the centrepiece of every evening. Expect heated debates about house rules.
gameRoom.feature2: Table football — for the competitive matches between generations. Grandparents vs. grandchildren is a classic.
gameRoom.feature3: Extensive board game collection — from quick card games to long strategic evenings. Something for every group.
gameRoom.feature4: Retro gaming — for enthusiasts who want to drift back to the '80s and '90s.

playBarn.title: The Play Barn
playBarn.description: The former horse stable, once home to draught horses, is now a play paradise for the very young. Covered, safe and right next to the house — toddlers and young children entertain themselves here for hours while parents enjoy coffee on the terrace.
playBarn.feature1: Go-karts and pedal cars — doing laps on the tarmac at the front of the farmhouse. Guaranteed the first thing they want to do every morning.
playBarn.feature2: Pedal cars and tractors — for the little builders and farmers in training. Sturdy toys that can take a beating.
playBarn.feature3: Tricycles for the little ones — even the youngest join in. No child gets bored here.
playBarn.feature4: Chalk drawing and free play — the farmhouse courtyard is one big canvas. Nothing to bring, everything is there.

differentiators.dishCabinetFeature1: Full inventory check — from the dish cabinet to the playroom, everything is counted and inspected.
differentiators.dishCabinetFeature2: Double stock — we keep many items in duplicate. Broken or missing? Immediately replaced, without you noticing.
differentiators.dishCabinetFeature3: Spotless on arrival — after every stay, the entire house is thoroughly cleaned. From kitchen to bathrooms, from living areas to bedrooms — down to the corners.
differentiators.dishCabinetFeature4: No surprises — you open the door to a house that's ready as if it's the first time. Everything complete, everything clean, everything works. Load your groceries and enjoy.
differentiators.livingOnSiteFeature1: Owner on the estate — no remote manager, but Bieke and Christophe right next door.
differentiators.livingOnSiteFeature2: Local tips you won't find anywhere — the best walk, the restaurant where locals eat, the market that's only open on Thursdays.
differentiators.livingOnSiteFeature3: Thoughtful design — two heating boilers for precaution and efficient consumption. Nothing is coincidence, everything is a deliberate choice.
differentiators.livingOnSiteFeature4: The house grows with us — after 25 years we know exactly what large groups need, and we keep investing.
differentiators.utilitiesFeature1: Warm welcome — the house is always heated to a comfortable temperature on arrival. You start in comfort.
differentiators.utilitiesFeature2: Clear billing — after your stay you receive a detailed overview. No estimates, no flat rates.
differentiators.utilitiesFeature3: Control & trust — meter readings are photographically recorded on arrival and departure. Transparent for both sides.
differentiators.utilitiesFeature4: Green Key candidate — we are working towards the international label for sustainable tourism. Fair consumption is the first step.
differentiators.utilitiesFeature5: Offset your journey — want to compensate the CO₂ emissions from your trip to ArdenNest? You can do so easily via Greentripper — a Belgian, certified carbon offset scheme for travel.
differentiators.certifiedFeature1: Certified by Tourism Wallonia — official recognition after inspection on comfort, safety and equipment.
differentiators.certifiedFeature2: Periodic fire safety inspection — the house is regularly inspected by the fire department. Including a sprinkler system above the stove.
differentiators.certifiedFeature3: Tailored insurance — specifically designed for group stays up to 26 people. You are fully covered.
differentiators.certifiedFeature4: Book with confidence — no grey area, no risk. Everything is in order, everything is inspected, everything is insured.

cta.title: Convinced?
cta.description: Check availability and book directly with us for the best price and personal service.

quietLuxury.title: Quiet Luxury
quietLuxury.description: No swimming pool, no sauna — by design. We invest in what truly matters when a large group comes together: a professional kitchen where cooking for 26 is a pleasure, an ensuite bathroom with every bedroom, and one table where everyone sits together. Thoughtful quality you feel, without having to think about it.
quietLuxury.feature1: Togetherness over entertainment — a house built for living together, not for seeking amusement.
quietLuxury.feature2: Ease over embellishment — everything works, everything is there, everything is clean. You just need to arrive.
quietLuxury.feature3: Space over busyness — 2 hectares of garden where children disappear and adults find peace.
quietLuxury.feature4: Quality over quantity — from the Lacanche stove to the De Witte Lietaer bedding: fewer features, higher standards.

kitchen.title: Commercial-Grade Kitchen
kitchen.description: Cooking for 26 is not a chore here — it's the highlight of the day. Lacanche stove, 2 Miele Professional dishwashers and enough cold storage for the entire group.

garden.title: Endless Garden
garden.description: A vast rolling landscape where children disappear for hours and adults unwind. Football field, pétanque, hidden spots and a terrace with barbecue.

mattresses.title: Sleep in Style
mattresses.description: A good night's sleep starts with what you feel. That's why we chose De Witte Lietaer — Flemish craftsmanship you notice the moment you slip between the sheets. Waking up rested is the foundation of a successful stay.
mattresses.feature1: Boxspring beds with 25 cm thick mattresses
mattresses.feature2: Bedding and bed linen by De Witte Lietaer
mattresses.feature3: Pure cotton sateen — silky soft with a subtle sheen
mattresses.feature4: Belgian family business, quality reference since 1898

dishCabinet.title: Checked After Every Guest
dishCabinet.description: You should never be affected by the group before you. That's why we inspect the entire house after every stay: every cupboard, every plate, every glass, every pan. What's broken is repaired, what's missing is replenished — before the next guest arrives. It sounds obvious, but for a house for 26, it's not.

professionalEquipment.title: Professional Equipment
professionalEquipment.description: Restaurant-quality pots and pans. Cook for 26 people with the right equipment.

livingOnSite.title: 25 Years On-Site
livingOnSite.description: This is not a remote investment — we live here. Since 2000, this 1849 farmhouse has been our home. The entire concept is ours: a house where the group matters more than the individual room. You don't come here to sit in your room. That's why we chose large, open living spaces and quiet corners on each floor to retreat to. Every choice — from the layout to the two Buderus heating boilers — was made from one question: what does a large group truly need?

utilities.title: Fair Consumption
utilities.description: At ArdenNest, we believe in transparency. Instead of a high flat rate, with a direct booking you only pay for what you actually use in heating, water and waste processing. A small group pays less than a large one — it doesn't get fairer than that.

greenKey.title: Green Key Candidate
greenKey.description: We are working towards the Green Key label, the international eco-label for sustainable tourism.

certified.title: Certified Holiday Home
certified.description: No self-declared quality — ArdenNest is officially recognized and certified by Tourism Wallonia. This means the house meets strict standards for safety, comfort and hygiene. For you, that's the guarantee you're booking with a professional host, not an amateur.

ventilation.title: Silent Central Ventilation
ventilation.description: All bathrooms are equipped with silent central ventilation. Optimal air quality without disruptive noise.

whyBookDirect.title: Why book direct?
whyBookDirect.subtitle: The benefits of booking directly with us

price.title: Best price guaranteed
price.description: No OTA commissions means the best price for you

contact.title: Direct contact with us
contact.description: Questions? We know the house like no one else

audience.heading: Who is ArdenNest for?
audience.intro: Not every group fits ArdenNest — and that's by design.
audience.yesText: families, friend groups and organisers who value quality time — including with vegetarians, people with reduced mobility, or young children.
audience.noText: stag parties, DJ nights, weekends with loud music and late hours. That's not what ArdenNest is for.
audience.noPetsText: this keeps the house comfortable for guests with allergies.
audience.closing: Looking for a place where everyone unwinds and reconnects? Welcome.

homeFaq.title: Frequently asked questions
homeFaq.moreCta: More practical questions? See our [full FAQ →](/en/faq)

questions.q: Is ArdenNest suitable for 3 generations together?
questions.a: Yes — that's precisely what ArdenNest was designed for. Grandparents, parents and children stay together under one roof, with 9 ensuite bedrooms each offering private space. The large living area and oak table for 26 bring everyone together — while separate sitting corners and the playroom respect individual rhythms. [Discover the house →](/en/property)

questions.q: What's within cycling distance or a short drive from ArdenNest?
questions.a: Plenty. 15-20 minutes by car: [Symbiosa park in Graide](/en/surroundings/active/symbiosa), the [Caves of Han-sur-Lesse](/en/surroundings), and the Furfooz nature reserve. A bit further — 25 to 30 minutes — Dinant and its citadel, [Dinant Evasion adventure park](/en/surroundings/active/dinant-evasion), Bouillon and the Semois valley. By bike you reach the RAVeL route along the Lesse and the immediate Gedinne surroundings.

questions.q: Can you really cook for 26 people?
questions.a: Yes, and it's enjoyable. The kitchen is fitted to professional standards: a Lacanche range, 2 professional Miele dishwashers and refrigeration capacity for the whole group. Cooking for 26 without crowding each other. Bringing in catering also works — both fit naturally here.

questions.q: What group sizes does ArdenNest suit?
questions.a: Ideal for groups of 10 to 26 people, with up to 18 adults. Smaller groups don't experience the house as empty — the separate living areas let your group gather naturally around a table or by the fireplace. Below 10, the 'all together under one roof' concept loses its value.

We don't host pets. This is a deliberate choice — keeping the house comfortable for guests with allergies and for groups looking for quiet and cleanliness. For travellers with pets, we're happy to suggest nearby accommodations that do accept animals.

questions.q: What sets ArdenNest apart from other group houses in the Ardennes?
questions.a: Three things. First: 9 ensuite bathrooms — not 4 or 5 as in comparable houses. Second: a professional-grade kitchen that makes cooking for 26 genuinely workable without it feeling like a chore. Third: personal welcome by Christophe — he greets every group himself and knows the house and region better than anyone. No anonymous key-box.

Three benefits. Best price guaranteed — no OTA commissions. Direct contact with Bieke and Christophe — questions get personal answers. Tailored where possible — early arrival, late check-out, or specific requests around catering or activities. [Check availability →](/en/booking)

story.heading: From Ferme du Château to ArdenNest
story.body: Since 2003 we've welcomed guests as Ferme du Château. Since 2026 we're called ArdenNest — more than a house, your nest in the Ardennes. Read why.

exclusive.heading: Activities we run ourselves
exclusive.body: Activities we organise ourselves for our guests — not available at other stays.
